moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Underway
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by USA, Canada, and Mexico, is officially underway, bringing global football action to screens worldwide until July 19.

angles.name: Global Football Fever
angles.copy: The biggest tournament in football is here! Who are you backing for World Cup glory? Catch all the action from the USA, Canada & Mexico. #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Early Tournament Buzz
angles.copy: Group stage drama is already unfolding at the World Cup! Which team has surprised you most so far?

moments.title: Glastonbury Festival Returns
moments.blurb: The iconic Glastonbury Festival is set to open its gates at Worthy Farm from June 24-28, featuring a star-studded lineup across multiple stages.

angles.name: Glasto Countdown
angles.copy: Just one week until the fields of Worthy Farm come alive! Who are you most excited to see at Glastonbury 2026?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Dust off your wellies, Glastonbury is nearly here! Get ready for five days of incredible music and legendary performances.

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, the Summer Solstice, occurs on June 20, marking the astronomical start of summer.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the Summer Solstice this Saturday! More daylight for longer tunes. How are you making the most of the longest day?

angles.name: Hello Summer
angles.copy: The astronomical start of summer is just days away with the Solstice on June 20th. What's your favourite thing about summer?

moments.title: Barry Manilow's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Barry Manilow, known for hits like 'Mandy' and 'Copacabana', turns 83 today, June 17.

angles.name: Fanilow's Day
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Barry Manilow! Still got us singing along to 'Copacabana'.

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring magic of Barry Manilow on his 83rd birthday. What's your favourite Manilow classic?

moments.title: Paul McCartney's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, iconic member of The Beatles and Wings, celebrates his 84th birthday on June 18.

angles.name: Macca's Big Day
angles.copy: Tomorrow, a true legend turns 84! Wishing a very happy birthday to Sir Paul McCartney. What's your top Beatles or Wings track?

angles.name: Living Legend
angles.copy: An absolute icon. Paul McCartney celebrates his 84th birthday tomorrow! Still inspiring generations.

moments.title: Paula Abdul's 64th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer, dancer, and choreographer Paula Abdul celebrates her 64th birthday on June 19.

angles.name: Straight Up Icon
angles.copy: She's 'Straight Up' amazing! Wishing a very happy 64th birthday to the incredible Paula Abdul on June 19th.

angles.name: Forever Your Girl
angles.copy: Get ready to dance! Paula Abdul turns 64 this Friday. What's your favourite track from the pop superstar?

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Music legend Lionel Richie, known for his timeless hits and smooth vocals, will be celebrating his 77th birthday on June 20.

angles.name: Hello Lionel
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? Lionel Richie turns 77 this Saturday! Celebrate the icon with us.

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: Get ready to party 'All Night Long' for Lionel Richie's 77th birthday on June 20th! What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her melancholic and cinematic sound, turns 41 on June 21.

angles.name: Summertime Sadness
angles.copy: Happy 41st birthday to the unique and captivating Lana Del Rey this Sunday! What's your go-to Lana track?

angles.name: Queen of Melancholy
angles.copy: Celebrating the artistry of Lana Del Rey as she turns 41 on June 21st. Her music truly speaks to the soul.

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'True Colors', celebrates her 73rd birthday on June 22.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Girls (and boys!) just wanna celebrate Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday this Monday! An absolute 80s legend.

angles.name: True Colors
angles.copy: Show your 'True Colors' for Cyndi Lauper as she turns 73 on June 22nd! What's your favourite track from her?

moments.title: Jason Mraz's 49th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Jason Mraz, known for his upbeat acoustic pop, celebrates his 49th birthday on June 23.

angles.name: I'm Yours
angles.copy: It's a happy 49th birthday to the incredibly talented Jason Mraz this Tuesday! What's your favourite Mraz song?

angles.name: Good Vibes
angles.copy: Sending good vibes to Jason Mraz for his 49th birthday on June 23rd! His music always brightens the day.

moments.title: Solange Knowles' 40th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning artist Solange Knowles, celebrated for her innovative R&B and soul, turns 40 on June 24.

angles.name: A Seat at the Table
angles.copy: Happy 40th birthday to the visionary artist Solange Knowles this Wednesday! Her influence is undeniable.

angles.name: Modern Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Solange Knowles as she turns 40 on June 24th! An artist who continues to push boundaries.

moments.title: Carly Simon's 81st Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Carly Simon, known for hits like 'You're So Vain', celebrates her 81st birthday on June 25.

angles.name: You're So Vain
angles.copy: You're so... 81 today! Wishing a very happy birthday to the iconic Carly Simon on June 25th.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring talent of Carly Simon as she turns 81 this Thursday! Her songs are true classics.

moments.title: Chris Isaak's 70th Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Chris Isaak, known for his distinctive voice and hit 'Wicked Game', turns 70 on June 26.

angles.name: Wicked Game
angles.copy: A very happy 70th birthday to the smooth and stylish Chris Isaak this Friday! Still making 'Wicked Game' sound incredible.

angles.name: Distinctive Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating the unique sound of Chris Isaak as he celebrates his 70th birthday on June 26th! What's your favourite track?

moments.title: H.E.R.'s 29th Birthday
moments.blurb: Five-time Grammy Award winner H.E.R. (Gabriella Wilson), known for her contemporary R&B, celebrates her 29th birthday on June 27.

angles.name: R&B Star
angles.copy: Happy 29th birthday to the incredibly talented H.E.R. this Saturday! A true voice of modern R&B.

angles.name: Grammy Winner
angles.copy: Celebrating the amazing H.E.R. as she turns 29 on June 27th! What's your favourite track from the multi-Grammy winner?
